milestoneTitle: Phase M9.19a.11c — State pill reads 'Not started' instead of 'Start'. User flagged 'Start' as ambiguous (reads as action 'tap me to start' instead of pure status 'hasn't been started yet'). Matches the grammar of 'Continue' and 'Done' — all three are status labels, not action verbs. The action verb ('Start lesson →') lives on the expanded-tile CTA button, so clear separation: condensed state pill = status, expanded CTA = action. Pill width bumped 84 -> 100px to fit the longer 'NOT STARTED' label; legacy grid-row/grid-column props removed (trailing cluster is inline-flex now, not a nested grid). Applied to all three renderers (renderLearnItemRow / buildLearnTileExpand / renderDashLearn).
